overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through rain-soaked Night City streets. The player navigates through highway underpasses, neon-lit commercial districts, and industrial waterfront areas during a heavy downpour at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with red warning lights

events.description: approaching open intersection while exiting covered highway section

agents.ego_description: driving through covered highway underpass at moderate speed following traffic

notable_agents.action: lead vehicle driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass with structural beams spanning across the road
red traffic warning lights suspended from the overpass ceiling
large concrete support pillars lining both sides of the underpass
vehicle ahead with red taillights visible through rain
urban commercial structures visible at the end of the underpass

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked highway underpass with red warning lights and concrete pillars. The vehicle follows a lead car toward an emerging intersection with commercial buildings visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: slowing down to navigate turn through commercial district
turning from commercial street into waterfront district

agents.ego_description: slowing down and navigating through urban streets with large digital billboards on the left

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements on the left side of the street
urban intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk markings
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a neon-lit commercial street with large digital billboards and graffiti-covered walls. The vehicle slows down to make a turn, exiting the highway underpass area into a more open urban district.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka Waterfront wide avenue with futuristic architecture

events.description: accelerating along the wide waterfront avenue
making right turn at intersection following road curvature

agents.ego_description: cruising through Arasaka Waterfront district with futuristic buildings and neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking on the distant sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: tall futuristic structures with illuminated windows and cyberpunk architecture
commercial storefronts with bright neon signage in cyan and red

segments.scene_description: Driving through the wide avenues of Arasaka Waterfront, passing futuristic buildings with glowing neon storefronts. The area features modern cyberpunk architecture with pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront road with palm trees and warehouses

events.description: rain intensity increases with heavier downpour reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: driving through wet industrial streets lined with palm trees and warehouse buildings

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the city lights lining the industrial road
large industrial warehouse structures with minimal lighting
dark tunnel entrance with overhead lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Cruising through the industrial waterfront area with palm trees and warehouse buildings. The rain intensifies as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance, with wet roads reflecting the sparse street lighting.

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel from open industrial street
descending ramp into underground parking area

agents.ego_description: navigating through enclosed tunnel and descending underground ramp

entered.detail: downward sloping concrete ramp leading underground with reflective wet surface
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
exposed concrete structural beams supporting the underground structure

segments.scene_description: Entering an enclosed underground tunnel and descending a concrete ramp. The environment shifts from open rain-soaked streets to a dry, artificially lit underground structure with visible support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: Northside industrial district with warehouses and neon signs

events.description: exiting tunnel into Northside industrial district with orange lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through Northside industrial area with gritty warehouse buildings and scattered neon signage

notable_agents.action: vehicle with headlights on passing by in the opposite direction

entered.detail: gritty industrial warehouse buildings with corrugated metal and concrete facades
illuminated signage for bars and shops with warm orange and red glow
metal chain link fencing along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into the Northside industrial district, characterized by gritty warehouse buildings, chain-link fences, and warm neon bar signs. The vehicle accelerates through the wide industrial streets toward an intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a claustrophobic highway underpass into the expansive, neon-drenched districts of the waterfront. It begins by following a lead car through a concrete underpass illuminated by red warning lights, moving steadily toward an emerging intersection. As the vehicle exits the tunnel, the scene opens into a commercial street where the lighting shifts to vibrant neon billboards and graffiti-covered walls. The camera then glides through the wide avenues of the Arasaka Waterfront, passing futuristic architecture and glowing storefronts before the environment shifts toward an industrial zone. Finally, the drive leads past palm trees and warehouses as the rain intensifies, with the wet roads reflecting sparse streetlights just before the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile, enclosed underground passage into the gritty, neon-lit atmosphere of an industrial district. It begins by descending a concrete ramp into a dry tunnel, where the open rain-soaked streets are replaced by artificial lighting and heavy support beams. As the vehicle maintains its momentum, the enclosed space opens up and the camera emerges back into the night air of the Northside industrial district. The scene then shifts to a landscape of weathered warehouse buildings and chain-link fences, illuminated by the warm glow of neon bar signs. Finally, the camera accelerates through the wide industrial streets, pushing forward toward a distant intersection.
